opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I had a big steak for dinner, and an hour later this awful, gripping pain started under my right ribs and shot into my shoulder.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Severe pain after a heavy dinner that hasn't fully gone away, want to know if I need to go to hospital tonight.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 45 minutes after a high-fat dinner, roughly 3-4 hours ago
symptom_narrative.duration: severe for the last 3 hours, feels like it's starting to ease off now
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: was about an 8 out of 10 at worst, now starting to settle
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: under my right ribs, shooting straight into my right shoulder blade
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it started, now beginning to plateau/ease
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing helped much except pacing around, paracetamol didn't do much
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: not sure — it just came on after the meal
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: felt very sick, threw up twice, no fever or chills that I've noticed, no yellow eyes or skin
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had milder versions of this before after fatty meals but never this bad
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: restless, pacing around the room, otherwise still able to get around

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: took some 2 hours ago, didn't help much

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: hoping this can be managed at home and doesn't want an unnecessary late-night ED trip

access_barriers.transport: spouse present with car available if needed
